title: I Am Invincible
description: Gain 10 Block. Automatically plays from your draw pile when it's on top at the end of your turn.
upgraded_description: Gain 13 Block. Automatically plays from your draw pile when it's on top at the end of your turn.
notes: This card will auto-play from the top of the draw pile at end of turn without being exhausted. The GainsBlock property is set to true.
